#SBATCH --time=12:00:00
#SBATCH --account=mcb200052p
#SBATCH --partition=RM-shared
#SBATCH -o lifer_4L3YB6_Actinomycin_11.out
#SBATCH -e lifer_4L3YB6_Actinomycin_11.err

set -e
cd $SLURM_SUBMIT_DIR
export PATH=/jet/home/aramamur/bin/Copasi/COPASI-4.34.251-Linux-64bit/bin:$PATH
PYTHON=/jet/home/aramamur/.conda/envs/nephro/bin/python
echo "Job lifer_4L3YB6_Actinomycin_11 started"
startime=$(date +%s)
$PYTHON hybrid_run.py Arguments_lifer_4L3YB6_Actinomycin_11.json Run_Info_lifer_4L3YB6_Actinomycin.json
endtime=$(date +%s)
runtime=$(( $endtime - $startime ))
date -d@$runtime -u +%H:%M:%S > lifer_4L3YB6_Actinomycin_11.time
echo "Job lifer_4L3YB6_Actinomycin_11 ended"
